stories.title: NBA free agency is here! Live updates on deals, tr...
stories.summary: We're tracking deals, trades, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including the latest on LeBron James, Kawhi Leonard, Jaylen Brown and more stars.

stories.title: Toronto goes all-in for Kawhi Leonard: Grading the...
stories.summary: Can Toronto make a run in the East with Kawhi Leonard? Will LA make more moves?

stories.title: Sources: Raptors near deal to trade for Kawhi
stories.summary: The Clippers traded Kawhi Leonard to the Raptors for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, unprotected first-round picks in 2031 and 2033, a 2027 first-round pick swap and two second-round picks.

stories.title: LeBron tells Lakers he plans to play elsewhere
stories.summary: James has informed the Lakers that the franchise can move on without him because he will play elsewhere, Klutch Sports CEO Rich Paul told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: Wizards to shun trade offers for Davis, source say...
stories.summary: The Washington Wizards have no interest in trading All-Star forward Anthony Davis and are not listening to offers for him, a source told Andscape's Marc J. Spears.
